Louis J. Bachleder, Esq., 386-0342, for petitioner James Kreling, moving for attorney's fees
Jerry Curtis, Esq., DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL 510/622-2120, for respondent and opposing party Department of Motor Vehicles
Upon request of respondent, the Court continued PETITIONER JAMES KRELING's motion For Attorneys Fees to January 24, 2003. Opposition to motion is due on 1/17 at noon, and reply on 1/22 at noon. Both documents should be served by personal delivery and courtesty copies to be delivered to the courtroom. Plaintiff is to prepare an order. (JJM/301) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855

MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandate Administrative
Off Calendar Oct-24-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JAMES KRELLING Motion For Writ Of Mandate-Administrative (C.C.P. 1094.5):
APPEAR: Louis Bachleder, Esq. 227-0900 for petitioner & moving party; Jerry Curtis, Deputy Atty General 510/622-2126 for opposing party California Department of Motor Vehicles.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling except driving privilege reinstated contingent on declaration from doctor be submitted in one week stating competent to drive. In addition, Court orders that different hearing officer hear matter. (302/AJR/MD) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
